meta.title: Free QR Code Generator | QR TeamCellMania
meta.description: Create custom QR codes with colors, logos and different styles. Free, no sign-up required, high quality download.

header.subtitle: Customize colors, shapes and logo in seconds

form.content_tooltip: Enter the URL or text you want to encode. For example: https://your-site.com, a WhatsApp link like https://wa.me/1234567890, or any free text.
form.content_hint: Can be a URL, phone number or any text.
form.model_tooltip: Defines the visual shape of the QR modules. All styles are equally scannable; pick the one that fits your brand best.
form.model_hint: 'Rounded' and 'Dots' look more modern. 'Square' is the classic.
form.dots_color_tooltip: The color of the QR modules. Use dark colors on a light background so scanners can detect it properly.
form.bg_color_tooltip: The background color of the QR. White or very light colors work best for reliable scanning.
form.qr_margin_tooltip: White space around the QR code. A minimum of 10px helps scanners detect it correctly, especially when printed.
form.img_margin_tooltip: Space between your center logo and the QR dots. If the logo covers too much of the code, increase this value.
form.image_applied_hint: It will appear in the center of the QR

steps.title: Enter the content
steps.description: Type the URL or text you want the QR to point to. It can be a link to your business, social media, WhatsApp or any free text.

steps.title: Customize the style
steps.description: Choose the shape of the dots and the colors. The dot color is the QR itself; the background color is what sits behind it.

steps.title: Add your logo (optional)
steps.description: Upload an image and crop it to appear in the center of the QR. Works great with brand logos. Max 5 MB.

steps.title: Adjust the margins
steps.description: The QR margin is the white space around the code. The image margin is the gap between your logo and the QR dots.

steps.title: Download your QR
steps.description: Click 'Generate QR' to see the preview, then 'Download PNG' to save it in high quality, ready to use.
